title: Would?
why_this_song: Would? by Alice in Chains (1992) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Into the flood again"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Same old trip it was back then"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Same old trip it was back then"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "So I made a big mistake"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Am I wrong?"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

Try to see it once my way

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "flood" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "flood" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "same" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "same" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Know me broken by my master

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Would?" was released in 1992. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Would?" foi lançada em 1992. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Would?" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Would?" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?
